note: M12e (F5) — the perspective scale (R_StoreWallRange setup + R_ScaleFromGlobalAngle). reference_model.wall_setup (rw_normalangle = seg.angle_BAM - ANG90 [our winding, empirically validated]; rw_distance = perpendicular view->wall distance = point_to_dist*sin(distangle)) + scale_from_global_angle (rw_scale = PROJECTION*sin(angleb)/(rw_distance*sin(anglea)), clamped [256, 64<<16]). Reuses point_to_angle/dist + finesine + fixed_mul/div (R6). PROJECTION via cfg.PROJECTION SSOT.
convention: rw_normalangle = seg.angle_BAM - ANG90 (validated: +ANG90 gave dist 0; -ANG90 gives true perpendicular 128 on the square room + positive scale)
validation: square room (test.wad MAP01, centre view): all 4 walls perpendicular dist=128; perpendicular wall straight ahead scale = PROJECTION/dist = 80/128 = 0.625 (40960) EXACT
